skills.description: [Center Position Only] If you have 1 more cheer on your stage than your opponent, this Arts gets +20. If you have 2 or more, this Arts gets +40 instead.

name: Otonose Kanade
collabEffect: めでたい日なのに…… : If the number of cheers on your stage is more than your opponent's, during this turn, this holomem gets Arts+40.

name: Otonose Kanade
bloomEffect: テンション超アップ！ : If the number of cheers on your stage is less than or equal to your opponent's, send 1~2 cheers from your archive to this holomem.

skills.name: 奏オンステージ
skills.description: If the number of cheers on your stage is more than your opponent's, this Arts gets +20 for each cheer more.

name: Natsuiro Matsuri
collabEffect: 優雅なてぃーたいむ！ : If your life is 3 or less, during this turn, all holomem with #Gen 1 on your stage get Arts+20.

skills.name: まちゅだってお姫さま♡
skills.description: If there is a 2nd holomem with #Gen 1 on your stage, this Arts gets +30.

name: Shiranui Flare
collabEffect: 手、繋いでいると温かいね : You may archive 1 card from your hand: Return 1 [Debut holomem, 1st holomem or Spot holomem] from your archive to hand.

skills.name: テレ隠しが下手ですな～

name: Shiranui Flare
bloomEffect: 俺のイナー！ : You may send the top card of your cheer deck to your [<Shiranui Flare> or holomem with #EN].

skills.name: 最高のともだち
skills.description: If your center holomem is a 2nd holomem, this Arts gets +30.

name: Shiranui Flare
collabEffect: ドリーミングエール : You may send 1~2 cheers from your archive to your [<Shiranui Flare> or holomem with #EN] center holomem.

name: Shiranui Flare
giftEffect: メロゥ・フラワリー : [1/Turn] During your turn, when this holomem moves to the collab position, deal 20 special damage to your opponent's center holomem and collab holomem.

skills.name: リレーションファンタジー
skills.description: [Collab Position Only] If your center holomem is a holomem with #Gen 3, this Arts gets +30.

name: Gigi Murin
bloomEffect: ラピッドファイア・ウィット : You may archive 1 holomem that is stacked to this holomem: Attach 1 <Popo> from your deck to your holomem. Then, shuffle the deck.

skills.name: アイアムアゲーマー
skills.description: Send 1 cheer from your archive to your holomem with #Justice.

name: Elegant PC
ability:
: Only one can be used per turn.

Return 1~3 [mascots and fans] from your archive to the deck and shuffle it. Draw 2 cards.

name: Creator PC
ability: Place 1 Debut holomem with Extra "You may include any number of this holomem in the deck" from your deck on stage. Then, shuffle the deck. Place 1 Debut holomem from your archive on stage.

name: Donut Shop Full of Memories
ability:
: Only one can be used per turn.

Reveal 1 [<Fuwawa Abyssgard> and/or <Mococo Abyssgard>] each from your deck, and add them to hand. Then, shuffle the deck. If your life is less than your opponent's, deal 20 special damage to 1 of your opponent's holomem.

name: Choco's Eggplant Yukhoe
ability:
This card can only be used if all holomem on your stage are <Yuzuki Choco> and your life is 3 or less.

During this turn, all [Debut holomem and 1st holomem] on your stage get Arts+20. Then, all 2nd holomem on your stage get Arts+60.

You may only use the card <Choco's Eggplant Yukhoe> once per turn.

name: Papa Quits His Job
ability:
: Only one can be used per turn.

This card can only be used if you have a collab holomem.

Choose your center holomem. During your opponent's next turn, when the chosen holomem would take Arts damage for the first time while in the center position, that holomem takes -300 damage.

name: Doom
ability:
: Only one can be used per turn.

This card can only be used if all holomem on your stage have #EN and you have 3 or less life.

Deal 50 special damage to both players' center holomem and collab holomem. However, a player's life does not reduce even if downed.

name: Gentle Monster
ability:
: Only one can be used per turn.

This card can only be used if your Oshi holomem is <Ichijou Ririka>.

Reveal 1 [<Ichijou Ririka> and/or <Struggle Meal>] each from your deck, and add them to hand. Then, shuffle the deck. If there are 3 or more <Struggle Meal> in your archive, during this turn, all <Ichijou Ririka> on your stage get Arts+50.

name: Rich Chocolat's Hamburg Steak
ability:
Choose 1 holomem on your stage. Restore 20 HP to the chosen holomem. If you have 2 or more events with #Food in your archive, send 1 cheer from your archive to that holomem.

You may only use the card <Rich Chocolat's Hamburg Steak> once per turn.

name: hololive Mythology
ability:
: Only one can be used per turn

This card can only be used if all holomem on your stage have #Myth.

Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Add 2 of them to hand. Then, archive the remaining cards.

name: HOLOTORI
ability:
Choose 1 of the following abilities to use.

■Archive 1 cheer from your holomem with #Bird. If you archived a cheer, draw 2 cards, and return 1 card from your hand to the bottom of the deck.
■Send 1 cheer from your archive to your holomem with #Bird.

You may only use the card <HOLOTORI> once per turn.

name: Myth
ability:
: Only one can be used per turn.

This card can only be used if you have 6 or less cards in hand excluding this card.

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Reveal any number of holomem with #Myth from among them, and add the revealed holomem to hand. Then, return the remaining cards to the bottom of the deck in any order.

name: We are ReGLOSS
ability:
: Only one can be used per turn

This card can only be used if all holomem on your stage have #ReGLOSS.

Reveal 2 holomem with #ReGLOSS from your deck, and add them to hand. Then, shuffle the deck. If you have fewer holomem on stage than your opponent, draw 1 card, and archive 1 card from your hand.

name: Cool Hoodie
ability:
The holomem with this tool attached gets Arts+10.

◆Additional ability if attached to a Buzz holomem
[1/Turn]When this holomem downs your opponent's holomem, draw 2 cards.

Only 1 tool can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: holoCape
ability:
■The holomem with this tool attached gets +50 HP.
■If the holomem with this tool attached is downed, you get life-1.

Only 1 tool can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: Aura
ability:
◆Additional ability if attached to <Mizumiya Su>
■[Center Position・Collab Position Only] Your opponent's center holomem requires +1 colorless for its baton pass.
■When this holomem's bloom level increases, draw 1 card.

Only 1 tool can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: Bloom&Gloom
ability:
The holomem this mascot is attached to gets +20 HP.

◆Additional ability if attached to <IRyS>
While this holomem has white cheer and purple cheer attached, this holomem gets Arts+20.

Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: GuyRyS
ability:
During your opponent's turn, if the holomem this fan is attached to is downed, reattach 1 cheer from the holomem this fan is attached to to your other holomem.

You may only attach this fan to your <IRyS>, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem.

name: Otomo
ability:
The holomem this fan is attached to gets Arts+10.

When this fan is attached to holomem from hand or archive, the holomem this fan is attached to is set to either active or resting.

You may only attach this fan to your <Cecilia Immergreen>, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem.

name: Mischievous Ruffians
ability:
The holomem this fan is attached to gets +10 HP.

During your opponent's turn, if the holomem this fan is attached to is downed, if that holomem has red cheer attached, draw 1 card.

You may only attach this fan to your <Fuwawa Abyssgard> or <Mococo Abyssgard>, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem.

name: Lui-tomo
ability:
The holomem this fan is attached to gets Arts+10.

During your opponent's turn, if the holomem this fan is attached to is downed, reattach 1 [red cheer or purple cheer] from the holomem this fan is attached to to your other holomem.

You may only attach this fan to your <Takane Lui>, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem.

name: Takodachi
ability:
The holomem this fan is attached to gets Arts+10.

[Center Position Only] Your opponent's center holomem and collab holomem are regarded as holomem with all colors.

You may only attach this fan to your <Ninomae Ina'nis>, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem.
